rationale: Review 2's finding on sqrtTower_sq_mem (SquareClass.lean:127) is correct and directly visible in the diff: it is a 2-line public theorem that merely does `rw [hroot]; algebraMap_mem` and is never referenced by any other definition or proof. Acting on it trims an unnecessary public API item (material under api-design), producing a strictly smaller and more minimal surface than the approve from Review 1 (which overlooked it).
